creator: peter@baileynm.com
text:
Detects Adaptec 1542, then repeats an error from ahainimboxes
	twice and hangs for an unknown time (>10 min) and eventually
	restarts.

	aha0: AHA1542CP FW Rev D.0(ID=46) SCS Host Adapter, SCSI ID=7, 16 CCBS
	ahainimboxes: Initialization command fails

	System is currently running 2.2.6 and working as a router, on
	the above hardware.

Fix: 

???
How-To-Repeat: 
	Boot above system from FreeBSD 3.0-19980927-BETA boot.flp.
